violations.text: The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (bread) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Bread was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The handwashing sinks in the toilet rooms used by food employees are lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding all food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

Raw animal foods (beef and eggs) were not stored properly to prevent cross-contamination. Except when combined as ingredients, different types of raw animal foods must be separated from each other during storage by using separate equipment or arranging each type of food in equipment so that cross contamination of one type with another is prevented. Refrigeration storage poster provided to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 0 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 150-400 ppm. Sanitizer was manually corrected. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service and all ice disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener and slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Cooked onions were 84 degrees after cooling for 2 hours. Onions were reheated to begin cooling process again. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Pork and breaded cheese observed held at 48-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Pork and cheese were placed in freezer to rapidly chill. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Cooked onions were placed hot in the refrigerator in plastic wrapped container greater than four inches deep. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Per discussions with staff, avocados and strawberries are not washed before being cut. Plant foods must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Ice bucket was not stored inverted. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Immersion blender was not in good repair, with shredded electrical tape around it. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Drain plugs are lacking for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonia sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sinks as test strips on site expired in 2023.. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machines. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
